name: GitHub repositories should require status checks before merge
description: Repositories where the default branch does not require status checks
body:
### Security intent

This control flags repositories where Cyscale did not observe required status checks on the default branch.

### Assessment context

Required checks help prevent changes from bypassing CI, tests, and security gates.
remediationDescription:
## Remediation

Update the default branch protection rule or repository ruleset to require successful status checks before merge.
